company.name: Infosys Limited
company.profile_summary: Infosys is a global leader in next-generation digital services and consulting, enabling clients in over 59 countries to navigate their digital transformation.
company.market_presence: North America (61% revenue), Europe (25% revenue), India (3% revenue), and other regions (11% revenue)

overview_findings: Revenue growth of 15.4% in the fiscal year 2023.
The company serves clients in 59 countries.
Focus on AI and digital transformation solutions for fiscal 2024.
Multiple recognitions for sustainability and corporate governance.
management_findings: CEO Salil Parekh faces allegations of unethical practices.
CFO Jayesh Sanghrajka is linked to ongoing investigations regarding financial irregularities.
Chairman Nandan Nilekani has a history of board tensions and past controversies.
financial_irregularities: Revenue growth of 20.5% from FY2023 to FY2024.
Positive cash flows increased by 33.5% from FY2023 to FY2024.
A slight increase in debt levels with rising debt-to-equity ratio.
Ongoing investigations could undermine financial integrity and transparency.
scam_signals: Volume spike of 3.8x median on 2026-01-22 without corresponding news.
Price decreased 24.03% over the 30-day period indicating sell-off.
Price gaps before drops suggesting potential manipulation.

people_profiles.name: Salil Parekh
red_flags: Allegations of unethical practices to inflate profits
Investigation by SEC for potential financial improprieties

people_profiles.name: Jayesh Sanghrajka
red_flags: Part of ongoing investigation regarding accounting irregularities
Linked to whistleblower allegations of unethical practices

people_profiles.name: Nandan Nilekani
red_flags: Tensions with board regarding operational decisions
Previous controversies during his tenure regarding accounting practices

final_verdict: MODERATE RISK: Proceed with caution, additional due diligence recommended
